--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18

→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 24 damage. Simic Hybrid — Bardic Musician HP: 43/67
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Simic Hybrid — Bardic Musician HP: 20/67
